summary: Such unfortunates will suffer automatic flame attacks every

mechanics.name_guess: Such unfortunates will suffer automatic flame attacks every
mechanics.breadcrumb_path: Rules Compendium > Page 120 > items > Such unfortunates will suffer automatic flame attacks every
mechanics.excerpt: Such unfortunates will suffer automatic flame attacks every turn until they are put out or the fire burns itself out: Each time character is hit by a incendiary weapon, the character i5 set on fire any of the dice rolled for damage came up as 65_ The character will burn for number of turns equal t0 the number of 6s rolled for damage, including any additional 6s generated from open-ended results.
